creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-19 14:02:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/libopensync-plugin-vformat-devel Makefile distinfo 
                                               pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This plugin is based on vformat.{c,h} which got adapted from evolution e-vcard
  parser. vformat.{c,h} parsing and assembling of vObject-like formatting. The
  term vformat is often use to describe this format of vCard 2.1, vCard 3.0,
  vCalendar, iCalendar and vNote.
  
  WWW: http://www.opensync.org/
  
  PR:             ports/125663
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.327     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-vformat-devel/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-vformat-devel/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-vformat-devel/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-vformat-devel/pkg-plist (new)
